name: Chicken with Capers
recipeIngredient: 1/3 Cup Nonfat Vegetarian Broth, Beef Flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 3 tbsp vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chicken breasts and cook for five minutes or until browned on all sides.
3. Remove chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, add chopped onion and mushrooms. Cook for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender.
5. Add crushed garlic to the pan and continue cooking for an additional minute.
6. Stir in balsamic vinegar, then return the chicken to the skillet.
7. Pour in the beef broth, tomato paste, and capers. Stir to combine.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil, cover, and simmer for five minutes.
9. Remove from heat and serve over baked potatoes or grains.
